required_complexity_patterns.notes: Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only
At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element
Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form
Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters)

reference_templates.title: Input inside nested label spans
reference_templates.notes: Input nested inside label which contains multiple inline spans
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Nested label spans

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Required: Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters) Reference DOM (Custom div dropdown): Location picked from custom div dropdown, not native select Reference DOM (Greenhouse progress dots): Greenhouse-inspired multi-section form with progress indicator dots Reference DOM (Input inside nested label spans): Input nested inside label which contains multiple inline spans Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: table-layout, aria-label-only, decoy-form, div-role-textbox, duplicate-name-attrs. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Custom div dropdown; Greenhouse progress dots; Input inside nested label spans.
